title: Hugging Face ships LeRobot v0.6.0 with world models, reward APIs, and rollout tooling
friendlyTitle: LeRobot got a big update for training and testing robots
summary: LeRobot v0.6.0 adds world-model policies, new vision-language-action models, reward-model APIs, six simulation benchmarks, a lerobot-rollout CLI, human-in-the-loop corrections, cloud training on HF Jobs, depth support, and faster dataset loading. The release focuses on closing the loop from robot failures back into better training data.
friendlySummary: Hugging Face updated LeRobot with tools for robot world models, reward checks, simulations, cloud training, and learning from failed robot attempts.
whyItMatters: Open robotics tooling is becoming more complete and practical. Developers and labs can now evaluate, deploy, correct, and retrain robot policies with fewer custom pieces, speeding up experiments that connect simulation with real-world behavior.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This makes robot AI easier to test and improve. Smaller teams can experiment without building every tool from scratch.
